$schema_note: Pre-Send Gate (Gate 2) per AKB_Deal_Flow_Orchestrator_Spec §4. 12 items. Transitions outreach_ready → outreach_sent. Replaces H2's Make-scenario filter logic once Acquisition Agent ships.
source: Orchestrator spec §4 Gate 2 + Bible v3 §3 send-window + Briefing §3

items.description: Pricing Agent has run within last 24hr
items.pass_criteria: ARV_Validated_At is set AND within pricing_agent_max_age_hours (Pricing Agent stamps this on success — used as proxy for 'has run')

items.description: Confidence_Score >= confidence_min (Rehab_Confidence_Score per working assumption — see check fn)
Current time within send_window in send_window_timezone
items.pass_criteria: now in America/Chicago is between 8:00 and 21:00 (8AM-9PM CT)

items.description: Last SMS on this listing not within agent_recontact_days (cross-listing scan is future work — see check fn)
items.pass_criteria: Last_Outbound_At is null OR older than 14 days

items.description: Agent_Prior_Outreach_Count routes script (0 = first-touch, >0 = repeat-agent). Always informational pass.
Approved_For_Outreach = true OR Execution_Path in execution_path_auto_proceed_values

items.pass_criteria: Outreach_Status is null OR in outreach_status_empty_values

items.description: Quo API reachable + healthy (env present + recent successful quo audit, or warn)
items.pass_criteria: QUO_API_KEY env is set AND last quo:send_attempt within quo_health_audit_max_age_minutes was confirmed_success (if any in window)
